title: eriochilus scaber subsp. scaber
intro: Eriochilus scaber subsp. scaber, also known as the 'nervous plant' or 'nervous prickly orchid', is a type of flowering plant native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can aid in wound healing and reduce pain and inflammation. The health benefits of Eriochilus scaber subsp. scaber include its potential to alleviate anxiety and insomnia, as well as its ability to act as an antispasmodic, relieving muscle tension and cramps. Eriochilus scaber subsp. scaber can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
